questions.questionText: パスポート、免許証、<u>履歴書</u>用の写真撮影は当店でどうぞ。
questions.explanation: "履歴書" (resume/CV) is read as "りれきしょ".

questions.questionText: その法案は、予想と違って＿＿＿＿通った。
questions.explanation: "すんなり" means smoothly or without resistance. The sentence means the bill passed smoothly, contrary to expectations.

questions.questionText: ヨウさんは日本語学校に通う＿＿＿＿、アルバイトで学費を稼いでいる。
questions.explanation: "〜かたわら" means 'while doing A, also doing B', often used for holding a job while studying or doing a side business.
